description: SMIntegration is an innovative open-source platform for integrated analysis of spatial transcriptomics and metabolomics data. It integrates spatial pattern recognition, differential comparison, network construction, and functional annotation into a unified workflow. Designed to address key challenges in spatial multi-omics correlation analysis, SMIntegration enables researchers to explore gene-metabolite co-regulation mechanisms through an intuitive web interface, revealing spatial heterogeneity in tissue development and disease progression.
name: SMIntegration
